task: Implement embedded browser pane (Option A: Tauri Window::add_child) to replace iframe-restricted BrowserPane and polling-based NativeBrowserPane

stories.title: Enable Tauri unstable feature in Cargo.toml
acceptanceCriteria: src-tauri/Cargo.toml tauri dependency has features = ["unstable"] and version = "=2.10.3"
SAFETY comment on the tauri dep line explains the semver exemption
cargo check --features desktop completes without error

stories.title: Implement Rust embedded browser commands in embedded_browser.rs
acceptanceCriteria: File src-tauri/src/embedded_browser.rs exists with 4 commands: create_embedded_browser, destroy_embedded_browser, navigate_embedded_browser, set_embedded_browser_bounds
create_embedded_browser uses app.get_window("main") -> Window<R> -> .add_child(WebviewBuilder, position, size)
destroy/navigate/set_bounds use app.get_webview(label) to resolve the handle
No .unwrap() — all errors propagate as Result<(), String>
cargo check --features desktop passes

stories.title: Register embedded_browser module and commands in lib.rs + main.rs
acceptanceCriteria: src-tauri/src/lib.rs has #[cfg(feature = "desktop")] pub mod embedded_browser;
src-tauri/src/main.rs invoke_handler includes all 4 embedded_browser commands
ExitRequested handler in main.rs closes eb- prefixed webviews (or relies on parent window close)
cargo check --features desktop passes

stories.title: Add embedded_browser to TypeScript types and IPC bridge
acceptanceCriteria: src/types.ts PaneKind union includes "embedded_browser"
src/ipc/bridge.ts has createEmbeddedBrowser, destroyEmbeddedBrowser, navigateEmbeddedBrowser, setEmbeddedBrowserBounds wrappers
TypeScript compiles without errors (pnpm build or tsc --noEmit)

stories.title: Implement EmbeddedBrowserPane.ts
acceptanceCriteria: File src/browser/EmbeddedBrowserPane.ts exists and implements the Pane interface
spawn() calls api.createEmbeddedBrowser with physical pixel bounds (no window.innerPosition offset — child webview uses window-relative coords)
scheduleFit() calls api.setEmbeddedBrowserBounds via ResizeObserver — no setInterval polling
dispose() calls api.destroyEmbeddedBrowser and removes the DOM placeholder
URL bar with back/forward/reload buttons present, same UX as NativeBrowserPane
TypeScript compiles without errors

stories.title: Wire EmbeddedBrowserPane into WorkspaceManager and make it the default
acceptanceCriteria: WorkspaceManager.createPane handles pane_kind === "embedded_browser" and returns EmbeddedBrowserPane
WorkspaceManager splitBrowser (line ~384) creates panes with pane_kind: "embedded_browser"
LayoutTree.ts newBrowserPane() returns pane_kind: "embedded_browser"
Existing native_browser and browser pane types still work (backward compat)
TypeScript compiles without errors
